title: Parse workspaces[]/tabs[] and thread workspace_label/tab_label through AgentRow
action: Per D2: extend the snapshot deserialization in src/herdr/wire.rs to also parse the workspaces[] and tabs[] arrays from the session.snapshot socket response (currently only agents[] is kept, everything else is silently dropped by serde with no deny_unknown_fields — see wire.rs:46-64). For each Agent, resolve workspace_label by joining agents[].workspace_id against workspaces[].workspace_id/.label, and tab_label by joining agents[].tab_id against tabs[].tab_id/.label. Add workspace_label: String and tab_label: String fields to whatever struct AgentRow is built from (or an equivalent resolved-label carrier) in src/web/api.rs, following the same mirroring convention AgentRow already uses between api.rs and web/src/api.ts (api.rs:16-23, api.ts:5-14). Add the matching fields to the TS AgentRow type in web/src/api.ts. This is additive only — do not touch, rename, or remove any existing Agent/AgentRow field (pane_id, workspace, display, kind, status, title). No UI change in this cell; web/src/views/switcher.ts is not touched.

truths: GET /api/agents response includes workspace_label and tab_label for every agent row, resolved from the live session.snapshot workspaces[]/tabs[] arrays (not hardcoded, not empty placeholders)
Existing agents[] fields (pane_id, workspace, display, kind, status, title) are unchanged in shape and value
If an agent's workspace_id/tab_id has no matching entry in workspaces[]/tabs[] (join miss), workspace_label/tab_label resolve to an empty string for that row rather than panicking or dropping the row

artifacts.substantive: deserializes workspaces[] and tabs[] from the snapshot response and exposes a way to resolve label-by-id, no stub/TODO
AgentRow (or its builder) carries workspace_label and tab_label populated from the wire.rs resolution
AgentRow TS type mirrors workspace_label and tab_label as string fields

key_links: src/web/api.rs reads workspace_label/tab_label from the wire.rs resolution, not recomputed independently
prohibitions: Do not remove or rename any existing Agent/AgentRow field
Do not touch web/src/views/switcher.ts or any rendering code in this cell
Do not introduce a new caching layer for labels — resolve fresh on every snapshot poll (per report: herdr emits workspace.renamed/tab.renamed, labels must not go stale)
Do not panic or fail the request on a workspace_id/tab_id join miss — fall back to empty string for that row's label(s)

verify: cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run typecheck

trace.outcome: Parsed workspaces[]/tabs[] from session.snapshot (wire.rs + socket.rs) and threaded workspace_label/tab_label through AgentRow (Rust + TS), joined by workspace_id/tab_id with empty-string fallback on miss
